description: Retrieves WHOIS registration details for a specified domain or IP address.

target.description: Domain name or IP address to query

returns.description: WHOIS output including registrar, registrant, registration dates, and contact details.

description: Performs network port scanning on a specified target using Nmap.

target.description: Domain or IP address to scan

returns.description: Open ports and network services detected, with version info where applicable.

description: Performs DNS reconnaissance and enumerates DNS records for a domain.

returns.description: DNS records and DNS enumeration data (A, MX, NS, TXT, etc.).

description: Detects phishing and typo-squatting domains resembling the target domain name.

returns.description: List of detected similar/typo domains and status metadata.

description: Performs DNS lookup for a domain using the dig command.

target.description: Domain name or IP to check

returns.description: Detailed DNS query results including answer and authority sections.

description: Performs a basic DNS host lookup for a domain or IP address.

returns.description: IP resolution information and forward/reverse DNS results.

description: Gathers a summary OSINT report for a specified target domain or IP.

target.description: Domain or IP address for OSINT summary

returns.description: Summary of domain/IP: WHOIS, DNS, open ports, and basic risk indicators.
